title: Suppress Stale Closed Parent Continuations
goal: Stop finished-work inspection from promoting archived continuation candidates whose explicit parent or continuation refs are externally closed.
non_goals: Do not make provider-specific trackers required by core planning.
Do not reshape planning state broadly.

intent.outcome: Autopilot should move past stale archive continuation candidates when provider-neutral evidence says their parent refs are closed.
intent.constraints: Consume only provider-neutral external-intent evidence; keep detailed archive evidence available.
intent.latitude: Add a bounded suppression path and tests in planning summary.
intent.escalation: Escalate if this requires changing external tracker semantics rather than using normalized evidence.

execution.next_step: Continue remaining workflow-friction-polish issues after #524 evidence refresh.
execution.proof: planning package tests, planning surface check, proof selector

invariants: External evidence is optional and provider-neutral.
Open or missing external refs must not be suppressed as complete.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: Remove small package-use friction discovered during dogfooding.

required_continuation.activation trigger: Continue remaining workflow-friction-polish issues after #524 closes.

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: Closed parent refs stop steering autopilot back into stale archive work.
iterative_follow_through.discovered implications: Closed-ref suppression removed the #485/#512 stale continuation path; older historical candidates without role metadata remain separate follow-up pressure.
iterative_follow_through.proof achieved now: Focused planning package tests, planning lint, planning surface check, proof selector, summary, and planning doctor pass.

intent_interpretation.inferred intended outcome: Continue open planned lanes while fixing package friction discovered through dogfooding.
intent_interpretation.chosen concrete what: Implement #524 because summary is currently routed to stale closed-parent archive continuation.
intent_interpretation.review guidance: Verify summary no longer reports intent-continuation-needs-promotion for closed parent refs.

execution_bounds.required validation commands: uv run pytest packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py -q; cd packages/planning; uv run ruff check .; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py
execution_bounds.stop before touching: Root CLI surfaces unless proof selects them.

stop_conditions.stop when: #524 acceptance is met, validated, archived, committed, pushed, closed, and external evidence refreshed.
stop_conditions.escalate when boundary reached: If provider-neutral evidence lacks enough data to distinguish closed parent refs.
stop_conditions.escalate on scope drift: If implementation starts changing roadmap maturity or external adapter shape.
stop_conditions.escalate on proof failure: If closed-ref suppression hides open or missing refs.

context_budget.live working set: finished-work inspection code, planning package tests, active execplan.
context_budget.externalize before shift: Update this execplan with proof and closeout.
context_budget.pre-work config pull: summary and issue evidence already run.
context_budget.context-shift triggers: Before moving to remaining workflow-friction-polish issues.

delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Dogfood package; commit/push per milestone; stay on current branch.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Exact suppression metadata and test shape.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: Suppression would depend on GitHub-specific state rather than provider-neutral evidence.

immediate_next_action: Add provider-neutral closed-ref suppression to finished-work inspection candidates.
invariants: Only explicit non-closure parent/continuation refs that are known closed should suppress a candidate.
contract_decisions_to_freeze: Closed external non-closure refs suppress historical continuation promotion but remain visible as inspection metadata.
open_questions_to_close: Should suppression require all non-closure refs to be known closed?
validation_commands: cd packages/planning; uv run ruff check .
completion_criteria: Closed parent refs in refreshed external evidence no longer become top autopilot recommendations.
Detailed finished-work inspection still records the historical archive and suppression reason.
Open or missing external refs still require promotion/routing.

execution_run.what happened: Finished-work inspection now loads provider-neutral external evidence and suppresses derived continuation candidates when all explicit non-closure refs are known closed. The suppression is recorded on the inspection while removing the candidate and signal from autopilot pressure.
execution_run.scope touched: planning package summary logic, planning package tests, planning state, and active execplan
execution_run.validations run: uv run pytest packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py -q; cd packages/planning; uv run ruff check .; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py; uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml .agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/suppress-stale-closed-parent-continuations.plan.json packages/planning/src/repo_planning_bootstrap/installer.py packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py --format json; uv run agentic-workspace summary --format json; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
execution_run.result for continuation: #524 acceptance is met; remaining workflow-friction-polish issues stay in the roadmap.
execution_run.next step: Archive this plan, commit/push, close #524, refresh evidence, then reingest.

finished_run_review.config compliance: summary and issue evidence used before promotion
finished_run_review.follow-on decision: Continue workflow-friction-polish after closeout; older historical candidates without role metadata remain outside #524.

proof_report.proof achieved now: planning package tests, planning lint, planning surface check, proof selector, summary, and planning doctor passed
proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: 136 planning package tests passed; ruff passed; planning surface health clean; planning doctor healthy

intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: Finished-work inspection now suppresses explicit non-closure refs that are all closed in provider-neutral external evidence, keeps the inspection metadata, and focused tests cover the behavior.

system_intent_alignment.relevant system intent: Make the package streamlined, lightweight, frictionless, cheap, modular, and small while preserving leverage.
system_intent_alignment.slice shaping bias: Remove stale routing noise rather than add new capability.
system_intent_alignment.broader-lane validation question: Does summary route to live work after this stale historical candidate is suppressed?

closure_check.why this decision is honest: #524 is implemented and validated, while the broader workflow-friction-polish lane still has other open issues.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py covers closed-parent suppression; summary no longer shows the #485/#512 stale candidate.
closure_check.reopen trigger: Summary again promotes an archived continuation whose parent refs are externally closed.

durable_residue.learned constraint: Finished-work inspection should use refreshed provider-neutral external evidence to avoid promoting stale closed-parent continuations.
durable_residue.motivation worth preserving: Without this, autopilot repeats already-completed historical work instead of moving to the next live lane.
durable_residue.promotion trigger: Already promoted into planning package behavior and tests.

execution_summary.outcome delivered: Suppressed stale archive continuation candidates when explicit parent/continuation refs are externally closed.
execution_summary.post-work posterity capture: Rule promoted to package code and guarded by planning package tests.
execution_summary.knowledge promoted (Memory/Docs/Config): Check/code promotion; no Memory note needed.
execution_summary.resume from: Refresh summary and continue remaining open workflow-friction-polish issues.

signals found: Dogfooding summary routed to a stale archived continuation for closed issues #485/#512.
signals routed: Older historical candidates without role metadata remain in workflow-friction-polish/historical audit pressure.

drift_log: 2026-04-28: Promoted #524 after summary recommended a stale closed-parent archive continuation.
2026-04-28: Implemented and validated provider-neutral closed-ref suppression for finished-work inspection.
